notes: Macro definition copied verbatim from Macros/calculate_binomial_P.sas. The 17-row demo allele-count table is taken directly from the macro's own annotation block (rows 41-60). One row (1 5, tot_reads=6) is dropped by TotReadCutoff=20, so the printed dataset has 16 observations. Output reports tot_reads, A1A2log2Ratio (clamped at +/-10), Ref_Frq, binomial_P (probbnml with min(A1,A2)) and logP.
